conservative.name: Rush of Knowledge
conservative.requirements: Intelligence 4+, 5 power, engaged with target, Education trained

success.description: You reach out and touch the target's forehead, imbuing his mind with a rush of Azyr magic. Until the end of the encounter, he acquires the Education skill (and the ability to read and write) if he did not have it acquired and gains 1 rank of training in Education if he did have it acquired
As above, and the target also gains the ability to understand and speak 1 language that he did not know before until the end of the encounter

sigmarsComet.description: You and the target both receive to Education checks until the end of the encounter

reckless.name: Rush of Knowledge
reckless.requirements: Intelligence 4+, 4 power per target, engaged with target(s), Education trained

success.description: Azyr magic flows from your outstretched hand and through the eyes of each target, entering their minds. Until the end of the encounter, the targets acquire the Education skill (and the ability to read ad write) if they did not have it acquired and gain 1 rank of training in Education if they did have it acquired
As above, and the targets also gain the ability to understand and speak 1 language that they did not now before until the end of the encounter

sigmarsComet.description: The first Education check performed by any of the targets gains
